name: S5_sample_set
description: Requested sample order should be preserved in output.

test.command:
[[result=0,stdout="^time 1.000
weight=1.000
joint root 0.000 0.000 0.000
joint spine 0.000 2.000 0.000
joint hand 3.000 2.000 0.000
time 0.000
weight=0.000
joint root 0.000 0.000 0.000
joint spine 0.000 1.000 0.000
joint hand 1.000 1.000 0.000
?$"]]--fade full.pose all

io_hint: Preserve the order of requested sample times; do not sort or assume a fixed default sequence.
